requirements.description: Single-page scroll experience with smooth anchor navigation between Hero, Collections, Lookbook, About, Contact sections
acceptance_criteria: Nav links scroll to correct sections via anchor navigation
Smooth scroll behavior enabled on html element
Hero section fills full viewport height (h-screen)

requirements.description: Lookbook lightbox — click-to-open full-screen image viewer with smooth scale animation and close button
acceptance_criteria: Clicking a lookbook image opens full-screen lightbox
Close button and backdrop click dismiss lightbox
Image caption displayed below lightbox image

requirements.description: Hero parallax scrolling — background image moves at different scroll rate, content fades out, subtle scale effect
acceptance_criteria: Background image moves at different scroll rate than foreground content
Hero content fades out as user scrolls down
Subtle scale effect on background image during scroll

requirements.description: Scroll-triggered animations — sections animate in on scroll using Framer Motion useInView with staggered delays
acceptance_criteria: Each section fades up into view when scrolled into viewport
Staggered delays create cascading effect within sections
Animations only fire once (not on re-entry)

requirements.description: Collection card hover interactions — lift effect, image zoom, expandable description on hover
acceptance_criteria: Hovering a collection card lifts it with Y translation
Image zooms slightly on hover
Description text expands below card on hover

requirements.description: Contact form with submit feedback — name, email, message fields with animated thank you confirmation
acceptance_criteria: Form validates required fields
Submit shows Thank you confirmation animation
Form resets after 3 seconds

requirements.description: Sticky transparent-to-solid navigation — fixed header transitions from transparent to frosted glass on scroll
acceptance_criteria: Nav is transparent at page top
Becomes bg-oat/90 with backdrop-blur-md after scrolling 60px
Mobile hamburger menu with animated icon transitions

requirements.description: Warm earth tone palette — oat, charcoal, warm gray, umber, sienna conveying autumn luxury
acceptance_criteria: All CSS custom properties defined in globals.css @theme
Colors consistent across all sections
No deviation from established palette

requirements.description: Typography hierarchy — Playfair Display for display/headings, Inter for body. Ultra-tight tracking on brand name, wide tracking on labels
acceptance_criteria: Playfair Display loaded via next/font/google
Inter loaded via next/font/google
Custom tracking tokens applied correctly (--tracking-ultra, --tracking-wide, --tracking-widest)

requirements.description: Luxurious minimal aesthetic — generous whitespace, large display typography, editorial-style image grids
acceptance_criteria: Sections use generous padding (py-32 md:py-48)
Large display headings (text-4xl to text-9xl)
Image grids use tight gaps for editorial feel

requirements.description: Custom scrollbar and selection styling — warm gray thumb, umber selection background
acceptance_criteria: Custom scrollbar with 6px width
Selection uses umber background with oat text

requirements.description: Three collections displayed — SS26 Gilded Afternoon, FW25 Amber & Stone, RES25 Last Light
acceptance_criteria: All three collections rendered with name, title, description, image
Collection images loaded from /images/

requirements.description: Lookbook — 5+ editorial images in masonry-style grid with captions
acceptance_criteria: All lookbook images rendered in grid
Each image has caption overlay on hover

requirements.description: Brand story and stats — philosophy text, atelier image, stats (Founded 2019, 12 Collections, 1 Season)
acceptance_criteria: Brand philosophy text rendered in three paragraphs
Stats grid shows 2019, 12, 1 with labels

requirements.description: Contact information and form — email addresses, Paris atelier address, contact form
acceptance_criteria: hello@entono.com, press@entono.com displayed
Paris address displayed
Contact form with name, email, message fields

requirements.description: No backend / no database — single-page static site, all content statically embedded in components
acceptance_criteria: No Prisma / database models
No API routes for content
All data embedded in component files

requirements.description: No e-commerce / no checkout — brand showcase site only
acceptance_criteria: No cart or checkout flows
No product detail pages

requirements.description: Mobile-first responsive design — hamburger menu, stacked layouts, touch-friendly interactions
acceptance_criteria: Mobile nav uses hamburger menu with full-screen overlay
Grid layouts stack to single column on mobile
Touch targets are adequately sized

requirements.description: Image assets pre-loaded — all images are pre-generated editorial photos in /public/images/
acceptance_criteria: All images reference /images/entono_*.png
No external image URLs

frontend: Hero component — parallax scroll listener + Framer Motion
Collections component — hover state management + AnimatePresence
Lookbook component — image grid + lightbox state
Contact component — form state + submission feedback
Nav component — scroll detection + mobile menu state
AnimatedSection — useInView hook wrapper for scroll animations
